// generate Functional testcase for account opening and transfer funds

#application--para Bank (https://parabank.parasoft.com)

#login to the application  with registered account details

 1. enter username and password 

2. user click on login 

# account open and transfer the funds to new account no

 1.verify Account services text  and   verify Account details  and extract the account no from account overview

 2. click on account open and open the savings account and  extract the accountno

 3. navigate to transfer funds  and  specify the  least amount  and transfer  the funds from existing account  to new account opened  and verify  confirmation text of amount transfered
